calendar.matters:
Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar May-11-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Nici Rodich.
Thomas Caudill, Esq. for Plaintiff: 1355 Market Street Associates, L.P.
Plaintiff's Witness: Ray Babcock, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Adria-Pacific-Bridgewood, Inc., a California corp dba Ploi & Company as follows:
Possession of the premises located at 1355 Market St., Floor 1, Space 117, San Francisco.
Back rent $69,352.00
Holdover damages $11,558.40
Attorney's Fees $2,610.00
Costs $580.00
Less Security Deposit credit of $16,512.00, for a total of $67,588.40
Judgment signed in open court.
